steps.title: Scale the given expression
steps.content: You do not need to solve for $x$. The target expression is $15x$, and $15x$ is exactly $3$ times $5x$: $$15x=3(5x).$$

steps.title: Use $5x=20$
steps.content: Substitute the given value into the scaled expression: $$15x=3(20)=60.$$ The value of $15x$ is $60$, which matches D.
